goal: 修复 Sherlog stale 降噪的 file-set 证据不足

summary.title: 用文件集合证明 Codex 软 stale
summary.what: 修复 review 指出的 stale 降噪证据不足：新增 sourceFileSetFingerprint/source_file_set_fingerprint，sync 写入 coverage，status/find 用 source file path-set fingerprint 而不是 fileCount 判断 source_content_changed。旧 coverage 没有 file-set fingerprint 时保持保守 source_set_changed。新增 same-count Codex file-set replacement 回归，确保非空旧结果仍输出 sync nextAction。
summary.why: fileCount 相等不能证明同一批 source files；一删一增也会同数量。如果继续用 fileCount 降级 Codex stale，会让 stale 非空结果看起来完整，重新引入旧索引误导问题。
summary.user_goal: 修复 Sherlog stale 降噪的 file-set 证据不足

decisions.point: 如何证明 soft stale 真的是同一文件集合变化
decisions.chose: 为 SourceSnapshot/CoverageRecord 增加 file-set fingerprint，只哈希 root 与相对 file path 集合。
decisions.rationale: 这直接回答 review 的 path-set 证据要求；mtime/size/content 仍留在 sourceFingerprint 中判断内容变化。
rejected: 继续使用 currentSourceFileCount === sourceFileCount 作为同文件集合启发式

decisions.point: 旧 coverage 没有 file-set fingerprint 时如何处理
decisions.chose: fresh 判断仍允许旧行在完整 sourceFingerprint 匹配时 fresh；但 stale 降级为 source_content_changed 必须有非空 file-set fingerprint 相等，否则保持 source_set_changed/sync。
decisions.rationale: 避免强制旧 fresh rows 失效，同时不把缺少新证据的旧 stale row 降级为软 stale。

decisions.point: 如何处理 Mainline overlap int_0fa1073f
decisions.chose: 分类为相邻互补而非语义冲突，并保留 Pi source_content_changed 的 recommendedAction=sync 行为。
decisions.rationale: 该 intent 的核心约束是 Pi 大 session 文件增长必须 stale/sync；本次修复只收紧 Codex 软 stale 的证据，并保留 Pi 回归测试。

rejected.alternative: 只把 staleReason 改名为 same_file_count_changed
rejected.reason: 这会承认启发式不精确，但仍无法安全隐藏非空 find 的 nextAction。

review_notes: 已处理 review finding: same-count file-set replacement 不再被误判为 source_content_changed。
已处理 Mainline process finding: int_0fa1073f 被分类为 Pi freshness 互补约束；int_62dc20da 是本 follow-up 的父 intent。
验证通过: npm test -- src/status.test.ts src/cli.test.ts src/db/coverage-store.test.ts src/sources/pi.test.ts -> 4 files, 60 tests passed。
验证通过: npm run check -> 30 files, 203 tests passed。

CLI smoke: ./node_modules/.bin/tsx ./src/cli.ts status --cwd /Users/envvar/work/repos/cxs --json 抽取 requestedCoverage；新 requested selector 有 sourceFileSetFingerprint，旧本机 covering row 无该字段所以保持 source_set_changed/sync。
本次仍未执行 npm release、未更新全局 shlog CLI、未运行 npx skills add 更新全局 sherlog skill。

architectural_claims: Soft stale classification requires an explicit source file-set fingerprint match, not just equal file counts.
sourceFingerprint remains the content/metadata freshness fingerprint; sourceFileSetFingerprint tracks the selected path set separately.
Old coverage rows without source_file_set_fingerprint can still be fresh when full sourceFingerprint matches, but cannot be downgraded to source_content_changed when stale.
sync remains the only index/coverage write command; status/find continue to use metadata-only source inspection for freshness.
behavioral_changes: same-count Codex file-set replacement now remains source_set_changed and keeps stale_or_missing_coverage nextAction for non-empty find results.
Codex active-tail append still suppresses nextAction for non-empty results only when sourceFileSetFingerprint matches.
status JSON now includes requestedCoverage.sourceFileSetFingerprint and coverage inventory currentSourceFileSetFingerprint/sourceFileSetFingerprint fields.

data_model_changes.name: coverage.source_file_set_fingerprint
data_model_changes.migration_notes: ensureSchema adds the text column with default empty string on write-open; read paths treat missing/empty values conservatively.

security_implications: No new raw content recall path, credential access, network access, or index mutation surface was introduced.
migration_notes: No manual database migration required; existing rows get an empty source_file_set_fingerprint until the next sync writes coverage.
Old rows with empty source_file_set_fingerprint are not treated as source_content_changed when stale.
Global shlog CLI and global sherlog skill remain unchanged until normal release/install steps are run.
